'''Tsserk''' was born on [[Trandosha/Legends|Trandosha]] and trained as a warrior. A drunken brawl forced him to leave his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] in disgrace. He eventually made his way to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and was hired by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]], [[Rava Teb'lya]], as a [[Bouncer (occupation)/Legends|bouncer]] for her massage parlor, the [[Rose Nebula]]. Tsserk impressed Teb'lya so much that she made him her personal bodyguard.

{{Char-stub}}
